## RawFilter interface

A filter which id is the value of the filter. It can be selected or not.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export interface RawFilter extends Filter 
```
<b>Extends:</b> [Filter](./x-types.filter.md)

## Properties

|  Property | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [id](./x-types.rawfilter.id.md) | string | The value of the filter. |
|  [modelName](./x-types.rawfilter.modelname.md) | 'RawFilter' | Model name to indicate the filter type. |
|  [selected](./x-types.rawfilter.selected.md) | true | Force [Filter](./x-types.filter.md) <code>selected</code> property to true. |
